filters.includeOpeningEntriesTip: Include opening/rollover entries in the prior-period column only (not in current-period movement)

info.fxFallback: Fallback rate used for some currencies

empty.title: No balances

filters.includeOpeningEntriesTip: Include opening/rollover in the opening balance only — not listed as movement rows (no prior-year amounts when starting at fiscal year begin)

empty.promptDesc: Choose the period and account, then click show to display the account statement
empty.loadError: A connection error occurred with the server
empty.noMovementsDesc: No movements for the selected criteria

fx.fallbackSome: Notice: some currencies are not in the bulletin — multiplier 1 was used
fx.noBulletin: No published FX bulletin in effect — multiplier 1 was used for all currencies.

accountsTree.title: Chart of Accounts
accountsTree.trashTooltip: Open the unified system trash bin
accountsTree.collapseAllTooltip: Collapse all levels (show only the first level)
accountsTree.loadFailedTitle: Failed to load chart of accounts
accountsTree.loadFailedDesc: A connection error occurred with the server
accountsTree.emptyDesc: The chart of accounts is empty
accountsTree.inactiveTooltip: This account is disabled — it doesn't appear in pickers but its code is reserved. You can re-enable it from the edit button.
accountsTree.lockedForPartiesTooltip: This account is reserved for Financial Management — individual parties under it are added exclusively from Financial Management pages.
accountsTree.fmManagedTooltip: This account is managed by Financial Management — edit and delete only from Suppliers/Customers/Banks/Cash Boxes/Payment Companies pages.
accountsTree.walletManagedTooltip: This account belongs to the digital wallets — add/edit/delete is managed exclusively from the Digital Wallets window.
accountsTree.openFinancialManagementTooltip: Open this account's Financial Management card
accountsTree.openFinancialManagementNotFound: No Financial Management card found for this account
accountsTree.fmManagedNoEdit: This account is managed by Financial Management — edit it from the appropriate Financial Management page.

form.saveAndAddAnotherTooltip: Saves the current account and keeps the form open to add another sibling under the same parent
form.maxLevelReached: Maximum levels reached (5). Cannot add a sub-account.
form.categoryHint: (based on code prefix — 1/2 = Balance Sheet, 3/4 = P&L)
form.nameConflict: This name is already used under the same parent

delete.title: Confirm account deletion
delete.confirm: Are you sure you want to move account
delete.info: It will be moved to trash and can be restored later. Deletion will fail if the account has children, journal entries, or an opening balance.
delete.warning: The code remains reserved until you restore the account or permanently delete it from trash.

bulletins.importTip: Import from a previous bulletin (archived or published)

empty.title: No bulletins
empty.description: Start by creating the first currency rate bulletin

bulletins.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete bulletin "{{name}}"?

form.editBeforeSave: You can edit any value before saving.
form.name: Bulletin name
form.baseCurrencyTip: The base currency is set in system settings and cannot be changed here
form.effectiveAtTip: Effective date and time in Baghdad timezone (Asia/Baghdad)
form.publishImmediatelyDesc: Set this bulletin as the default immediately after saving
form.allUsed: All enabled currencies are already used in this bulletin

import.title: Import from previous bulletin
import.hint: Select a bulletin to import its lines as a new editable bulletin before saving.

cashBoxes.title: Cash Boxes (Safes)
cashBoxes.description: Manage company cash boxes: link each box to a GL account, track balances and inter-box transfers (generates paired entries via a transit account).
cashBoxes.newTransferNeedTwo: You need at least two active cash boxes
cashBoxes.searchPlaceholder: Search by code, name, or account...
cashBoxes.noEditPerm: You do not have edit permission
cashBoxes.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"?

dialog.codeUsed: This code is already in use
dialog.codeLocked: Code cannot be changed after creation
dialog.accountHint: Linked GL account (receives entries from vouchers).
dialog.currenciesHint: Set accepted currencies with optional debit/credit limits per currency.
dialog.boxActive: Cash box is active (available for vouchers and permissions)

balances.title: Cash box balances
balances.hint: Calculated from posted journal lines only — red limits indicate the configured limit was exceeded.
balances.totalHint: (sum of all cash box balances per currency)
balances.empty: No balances yet — create cash boxes or add transactions.

transfers.title: Inter-box transfer log
transfers.hint: Two-step approval: the send entry is created immediately; the receive entry is created only after the receiving cashier confirms. To edit a received transfer, first unreceive it (requires sufficient balance), then cancel and resend.
transfers.empty: No transfers yet — use "New transfer" above.
transfers.deletePermanentTooltip: Permanently delete transfer and its entries
transfers.deletePermanentTooltipReason: Permanently delete transfer and entries — cancellation reason: {{reason}}

actionDialog.receiveSubtitle: On confirm, a receive entry will be created at the date/time below and the amount will be added to the receiving box.
actionDialog.unreceiveSubtitle: A reversal entry will deduct from the receiving box and return the amount to the transit account — requires sufficient balance. After that, the sender can edit or cancel the transfer.

transferDialog.editLockedHint: Boxes and currency cannot be changed here — cancel this transfer and create a new one.
transferDialog.sameBoxError: Cannot transfer to the same box — choose a different destination.
transferDialog.noSharedCurrencies: No active shared currencies between "{{from}}" and "{{to}}".
transferDialog.amountPositive: Amount must be greater than zero
transferDialog.receiveDateHint: Receive date is set later when the receiving cashier confirms receipt.
transferDialog.transitHint: Independent sub-account used to hold funds in transit until the receiving box confirms. Debited on send entry, credited on receive entry (after approval).
transferDialog.transitLinkedError: Selected account is linked to a cash box — choose an independent transit account
transferDialog.descriptionPlaceholder: e.g. Fund branch box from main box
transferDialog.postSendImmediately: Post send entry immediately (visible in journal)
transferDialog.receiveEntryHint: Generated when the receiving cashier clicks Receive and sets the actual date/time.
transferDialog.cancelConfirmHint: A reversal of the send entry will return funds to the sending box. This cannot be undone. Enter a reason (optional) and confirm:
transferDialog.editSuccess: Transfer updated and send entry regenerated.
transferDialog.createSuccess: Send entry generated — awaiting receiving box approval.
transferDialog.cancelSuccess: Transfer cancelled and send entry reversed.

deleteDialog.title: Permanently delete transfer
deleteDialog.willDelete: The following will be permanently deleted:
deleteDialog.warning: This cannot be undone — transfer entries (send + cancellation reversal) offset each other; deleting them together preserves ledger integrity.
deleteDialog.confirmLabel: To confirm, type the transfer number
deleteDialog.success: Transfer and all related entries deleted

showHide.title: Show / Hide sections
showHide.description: Choose which sections to display in the sidebar

collapse.title: Collapse / Expand sections
collapse.description: Control which sections are open by default when the app loads

info.line1: <bold>Accounting</bold> and <bold>System</bold> are core and cannot be hidden.
info.line2: Preferences are saved to your account on the server — they appear on every device you log in to. Each user has their own independent preferences.

empty.title: Configure quick shortcuts
empty.description: Pick the pages you use most for one-click access from the dashboard

dialog.intro: Pick the pages you want as quick buttons on the dashboard. Only pages your permissions allow appear, and your preferences are saved to your account.
dialog.noneSelected: No shortcuts yet — pick from the available pages to add them.
dialog.noneAvailable: No pages available with your current permissions.
dialog.autoSaved: Changes are saved automatically and synced to your account.

login.subtitle: Sign in to manage your company

forgot.title: Reset password
forgot.subtitle: Enter your username or registered email — we'll send a temporary password
forgot.hint: Use your login name (e.g. nabeel) or the email registered on your account
forgot.success: A temporary password was sent to your email — sign in, then set a new password
forgot.failed: Could not send the password — check your details or contact your administrator

login.needAccount: Need a new account? Contact the platform administrator
login.passwordHint: Password is case-sensitive — copy it exactly as provided
login.mustChangeRedirect: You must change your password before continuing
login.mustChangeOnSamePage: Set a new password to continue

resetView.title: Temporary login credentials
resetView.subtitle: Copy your username and password, then sign in
resetView.mustChange: You must set a new password when you sign in
resetView.invalid: This link has expired or is invalid

changePassword.title: Change password
changePassword.subtitle: You must set a new password before continuing.
changePassword.currentHint: Enter the password your admin gave you — case-sensitive
changePassword.newHint: At least 8 characters — different from the temporary one
changePassword.success: Password changed — you can continue now
changePassword.minLength: New password must be at least 8 characters
changePassword.mismatch: Confirmation does not match new password

errors.sameAsCurrent: New password must differ from the current one

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.loadErrorDesc: Check your connection to the server and try again.
dashboard.noSalesData: No sales in the last 7 days
dashboard.noRepsData: No sales rep activity this month
dashboard.noLowStock: No items below minimum stock level

voucherTypes.title: Voucher / Entry Types
voucherTypes.subtitle: Create customizable entry types (receipt voucher, payment voucher, adjustment, …) and link them to default accounts from the chart of accounts.
voucherTypes.cannotDeleteSystem: Cannot delete a built-in system type
voucherTypes.cannotDeleteSystemEnabled: Disable the system type first, then delete it if unused
voucherTypes.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"?
voucherTypes.confirmDeleteSystemLinked: {{count}} linked entries will be detached from "{{name}}" and the type will be deleted. Journal entries remain intact. Continue?

dialog.codeReadOnly: Code cannot be changed after creation
dialog.descriptionPlaceholder: e.g. Cash received from customers or revenues
dialog.defaultAccountsHint: When creating an entry with this type, accounts are auto-filled from these settings.
dialog.sameAccountError: Debit and credit accounts cannot be the same
dialog.natureSectionHint: The voucher nature determines the behavior of the standalone voucher page: which side is debit and which is credit.
dialog.showInSidebar: Show as standalone page in sidebar
dialog.showInSidebarMixedNote: Mixed type: will open with the multi-line journal entry layout
dialog.isEnabled: Available for use in new entries

voucherEntry.typeNotFound: Voucher type with code {{code}} not found or disabled.

buttons.postImmediatelyTip: Save the entry as Posted directly or keep as Draft
buttons.noChangesTip: No changes — edit the voucher to enable update

locks.periodSuffix: — entries cannot be created, edited or deleted on this date.
locks.periodHint: To make changes, unlock the period from the "Fiscal periods" page, or pick a date within an open period.
locks.outsideFYHint: Note: changing the date field in the form does not unlock this entry — the original fiscal year of the voucher determines whether it can be edited.

fields.boxSingleOnly: Only one box is available within your permissions

actions.openInCoa: Account card in chart of accounts
actions.openInFmDisabled: This account is not registered in financial management
actions.partyNotFound: No financial management card found for this account

summary.title: Resulting entry summary
summary.empty: Fill the fields above to see the entry summary.

errors.sameAccount: Box account and counter account cannot be the same
errors.amountPositive: Amount must be greater than zero
errors.outsideFY: Cannot edit a voucher outside the active fiscal year "{{fy}}". Activate the proper fiscal year first.
errors.printIncomplete: Voucher data is incomplete for printing

transferLocked.titleTransfer: This entry was generated from a cash-box transfer
transferLocked.titleReversal: This entry is a transfer reversal
transferLocked.subtitleNumber: Entry {{number}} cannot be edited or deleted from this page.
transferLocked.hint: To keep the send/receive pair consistent, edit or cancel from the "Transfers" tab in the cash boxes window (reverse the receive first if the transfer was received).

deleteConfirm.title: Confirm voucher deletion
deleteConfirm.question: Are you sure you want to delete
deleteConfirm.attachmentsWarning_one: One attached file in the voucher archive will also be deleted.
deleteConfirm.attachmentsWarning_other: {{count}} attached files in the voucher archive will also be deleted.

journalEntries.connectionError: An error occurred connecting to the server
journalEntries.noEntriesDesc: No entries match the selected filters
journalEntries.voucherTypeNotFoundDesc: No enabled voucher type with code "{{code}}". Check voucher type management.
journalEntries.loadPrintFailed: Failed to load data for printing

filters.searchPlaceholder: Entry no., voucher no., manual no., or description...

postDrafts.tip: Post all draft entries matching current filters (respects permissions and cash box limits)
postDrafts.confirm: Post {{count}} unposted entries matching current filters?
postDrafts.nonePosted: No entries were posted — check permissions, limits, or accounting period

entry.outsideFYTip: Entry is outside the active fiscal year — source can't be opened
entry.dragReorderTip: Drag to reorder · drag edge to resize

journalEntries.outsideFYReason: Entry date ({{date}}) is outside the active fiscal year "{{fy}}". You can only preview it, or activate another fiscal year to edit.

view.title: Journal entry
view.viewOriginalEntryTip: Go to the original entry (#{{num}}) that was reversed
view.openTransferSourceTip: Open the cash box transfers page for the related transfer
view.transferLockedTip: Edit from the Cash box transfers page
view.balanced: Entry is balanced — total debit = total credit = {{total}}

license.title: System License Card
license.footer: Verified locally via signed receipts — no internet required.

badge.graceTitle: License in grace period — renew soon

buy.title: Buy additional days
buy.activeCardSession: A card session is active — finish or cancel it first

pending.title: Waiting for payment via QiCard...
pending.subtitle: {{amount}} {{currency}} for {{days}} days. The license will activate automatically once QiCard confirms.
pending.paid: Payment successful — {{days}} days added to the license.
pending.failed: Payment failed. Please try again or use another payment method.
pending.expired: Payment session expired. Please create a new payment request.

test.title: Test tools (admin)
test.description: Adjusts the end date of the last activation to verify read-only behavior — signed in the Hash Chain.
test.restoreSuccess: License restored for testing by 30 days.

filters.valuatedHint: Convert amounts to the base currency using the published rate bulletin
filters.valuatedOnlyAll: Valuation is only available with "All currencies"
filters.includeOpeningEntriesTip: Include opening/rollover entries in the prior-period column only (not in current-period movement)
filters.fxFallback: At least one currency has no exchange rate in the published bulletin — multiplier 1 was used (numbers may be inaccurate).

trialBalance.noMovements: No movements in the selected period
trialBalance.noMovementsDesc: Try changing the period or clearing the currency / level / leaves-only filters

profit.title: Profit / Loss Calculation
profit.formulaLine: Net Income = Total Revenue − Total Expenses
profit.revenueNote: Total Revenue — sum of (credit − debit) for revenue accounts in the current period only (excludes opening balance).
profit.expenseNote: Total Expenses — sum of (debit − credit) for expense accounts in the current period only.
profit.profitNote: If positive → net profit; if negative → net loss.
profit.closingNote: This is before adjustments and closing. To close the period and transfer profit to equity, use an adjustment entry to move net income to a retained-earnings account.

fiscalYears.title: Fiscal Periods
fiscalYears.subtitle: Manage fiscal years, close them, and roll over balances

empty.title: No fiscal years
empty.description: Start by creating a new fiscal year

detail.activateClosedTip: Set for reports and read-only — year stays closed to new entries
detail.alreadyActive: This is the currently active fiscal year
detail.activateTip: Set this year as the default for reports
detail.resyncTip: Re-sync monthly periods to match the year's dates (deletes out-of-range periods)
detail.reopenTip: Unlock the fiscal year and reopen its periods for editing
detail.rolloverTip: Roll over balance sheet balances to the next year
detail.rolloverRequiresClosed: The fiscal year must be closed before rollover
detail.rolloverAlreadyDone: Balances were already rolled over — cancel rollover first to try again
detail.rolloverNoTarget: No next fiscal year exists to roll balances into
detail.cancelRolloverTip: Delete opening entries in the selected year and reopen the source year
detail.cancelRolloverConfirm: This will delete {{count}} opening entry/entries in «{{target}}» and reopen «{{source}}». Cancel rollover?
detail.cannotClose: Cannot close — review the following issues:
detail.bulkTip: Close/open all periods up to/from a specific date in one click
detail.closedNote: Year is closed — unlock first to edit
detail.draftEntriesTitle: Unposted entries (open each to post or delete):

period.close: Close period (prevents creating/editing entries in it)
period.lockedUnlockFirst: Period is locked — open it first
period.editTip: Edit period dates (if no entries exceed the new range)
period.deleteTip: Delete period (rejected if it contains entries)

closeModal.title: Close Fiscal Year {{year}}
closeModal.warning: Closing the fiscal year will lock all its periods — entries cannot be edited afterwards.

editModal.title: Edit Fiscal Year {{year}}
editModal.endRequired: End date is required — make sure to enter a valid day (e.g. November has 30 days, February has 28/29).
editModal.endBeforeStart: End date must be after start date
editModal.note: Note: If the year contains accounting entries, the range cannot be narrowed below those entry dates. Monthly periods will be updated automatically.

deleteModal.title: Delete fiscal year
deleteModal.confirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"?
deleteModal.warning: Deletion will be rejected if the year contains accounting entries or is closed. If deleted, all monthly periods are deleted too.
deleteModal.typeToConfirm: To confirm, type the year name:

reopenModal.title: Unlock Fiscal Year {{year}}
reopenModal.heading: Confirm unlock
reopenModal.warning: All periods in this year will be returned to "open" status, and creating/editing/deleting entries will be allowed again. Use this carefully — if you have already rolled over balances to a subsequent year, the request will be rejected until you delete the opening entry in that year first.

editPeriodModal.title: Edit period {{num}}
editPeriodModal.outOfRange: Period must be within the year's range ({{start}} → {{end}})
editPeriodModal.note: Note: If the period contains accounting entries, the range cannot be narrowed below those entry dates.

deletePeriodModal.title: Delete period {{num}}
deletePeriodModal.confirm: Are you sure you want to delete period {{num}}?
deletePeriodModal.warning: Deletion will be rejected if the period contains accounting entries. This action cannot be undone.

resyncModal.title: Re-sync monthly periods
resyncModal.desc: Empty periods outside the fiscal year range will be deleted, and the remaining periods will be adjusted to match {{start}} → {{end}}. Periods with entries will not be affected.
resyncModal.outOfRange: Out-of-range periods (will be deleted if empty)

rolloverModal.title: Rollover balances
rolloverModal.sourceOpen: Source year is open — must be closed first
rolloverModal.sourceOpenNote: To ensure stable balances, the source fiscal year must be closed before rolling over.
rolloverModal.noNextFY: No subsequent fiscal year. Create a new year first.
rolloverModal.mode1Desc: Rolls over balance sheet accounts (assets + liabilities + equity) and calculates net profit/loss from revenues and expenses, then posts it to the profit or loss account.
rolloverModal.mode2Desc: Transfers only balance sheet balances (assets + liabilities + equity) as-is, without calculating profit/loss and without affecting revenues and expenses.
rolloverModal.mode3Desc: Rolls over all four account types as opening balances in the new year. Preserves balances as-is without closing the result.
rolloverModal.accountSearchPlaceholder: Search by number or account name...
rolloverModal.noAccounts: No detail accounts — create the accounts tree first.
rolloverModal.accountNote: You can choose any detail account as profit/loss account (e.g. equity or reserve accounts) — there is no restriction on account type.
rolloverModal.previewOnly: Preview only (no execution — to see expected result)
rolloverModal.undoConfirm: The rolled-over opening entry in the target year will be deleted, opening balances cleared, and the source year will be automatically reopened. Continue?
rolloverModal.undoTip: Delete opening entry and reopen previous year

bulkModal.title: Bulk close/open monthly periods
bulkModal.closeUptoDesc: Applied to all periods ending on date ≤ the specified date
bulkModal.openFromDesc: Applied to all periods starting on date ≥ the specified date
bulkModal.dateOutOfRange: Date must be within the fiscal year's bounds.
bulkModal.noPeriods: No periods match the current criteria, or all are already in the desired status.

settings.logoHint: PNG / JPG / SVG — up to 2 MB
settings.previewLabel: Preview how the header will appear

identity.title: Company Identity
identity.description: Name, logo and contact info shown in printed reports

printing.title: Printing & Reports
printing.description: Customize print header and footer with live preview

email.description: Connect Zoho Mail to send e-invoice replies via SMTP

contacts.title: Phones & email registry
contacts.description: View all phone numbers and emails with global duplicate prevention

currencies.title: Currencies & Exchange Rates
currencies.description: Enable supported currencies and choose the base currency

users.title: Users & Permissions
users.description: Manage login accounts, roles and permissions

roles.title: Roles & Permissions
roles.description: Define what each role can do

menu.title: Sidebar menu settings
menu.description: Show/hide sections and set default collapse

locale.title: Regional preferences
locale.description: Language, calendar, date/number format, timezone. Coming in a future update.

backup.title: Backup & Restore
backup.description: Export database, schedule auto-backups, restore when needed.

storage.title: Voucher archive
storage.description: Where attached voucher files are stored — local path or Cloudflare R2.

notifications.title: Notification integrations
notifications.description: Send voucher and entry notifications via SMS, email, or Telegram.

integrations.title: Parent platform integration
integrations.description: Link the parent (center) platform to this company — orders and license.

about.title: About the system
about.description: Version info and service health check

integrations.intro: Connects the company system to the Iraqi Trade Center parent platform. Use the details below when configuring the parent to push orders.
integrations.parentDbMissing: Not found or cannot reach Parent database
integrations.webhookHint: Called by the parent when a trader order is confirmed. Send header X-ITC-Integration-Key with the AuthKey value.

contacts.title: Contact registry
contacts.description: All emails and phone numbers used in users and financial management — each value is unique system-wide.
contacts.deleteConfirm: Remove "{{value}}" from the phone & email registry?
contacts.deleted: Entry removed from the contact registry

whatsapp.title: WhatsApp settings
whatsapp.description: Send OTP codes, invoices and reports via WhatsApp (UltraMsg or Meta Cloud API).
whatsapp.enabled: Enable WhatsApp messaging from the system
whatsapp.useEmailForOtp: Send OTP via email temporarily (instead of WhatsApp)
whatsapp.providerUltraMsgHint: Quick QR pairing — good for trials and immediate sending.
whatsapp.providerMetaHint: Official Meta API — recommended for production (requires Meta app and Phone Number ID).
whatsapp.phoneNumberIdHint: From Meta → App → WhatsApp → API Setup → copy «Phone number ID» only (not App ID or WhatsApp Business Account ID).
whatsapp.metaIdMismatchWarning: ID {{id}} looks wrong — use Phone number ID from API Setup, not WABA ID or App ID.
whatsapp.metaAuthErrorHint: If you see Authentication Error: generate a new Permanent Access Token in Meta and paste it fully. Ensure Phone Number ID = {{phoneNumberId}} (from API Setup for your current number).
whatsapp.metaTokenInvalidTitle: Invalid Meta token — WhatsApp will not work
whatsapp.metaTokenSteps: 1) Meta Business → Settings → System users → Create System User. 2) Assign WhatsApp app and account. 3) Generate permanent token with whatsapp_business_messaging. 4) Paste fully here and save.
whatsapp.metaWabaIdHint: From Meta → App → WhatsApp → API Setup → copy «WhatsApp Business Account ID». When set, the system auto-discovers your approved OTP template and sends it automatically (no template name needed).
whatsapp.metaTokenHint: From Meta for Developers → App → WhatsApp → API Setup. Leave blank to keep saved token or paste a new one to replace.
whatsapp.tokenNotSet: No token saved yet — paste the token and click Save.
whatsapp.metaTemplateNote: Meta does not allow free-text business-initiated messages — you must use an approved Authentication template for OTP. Create it in Meta Business Manager → WhatsApp Manager → Message templates.
whatsapp.metaTemplatesHint: Enter the approved OTP template name and language from Meta (Authentication category).
whatsapp.metaOtpTemplateNameHint: From WhatsApp Manager → Message templates → copy Template name (e.g. verify_code or otp_verification).
whatsapp.metaOtpTemplateLanguageHint: Exact language code from Meta (e.g. ar, ar_AR, or en_US) — if delivery fails try ar_AR.
whatsapp.metaPrimaryDeviceHint: OTP messages are delivered to the primary WhatsApp device — they may not appear on WhatsApp Web or linked devices.
whatsapp.metaOtpTemplateRequired: Required: without an approved OTP template, WhatsApp delivery will fail (email is used as fallback).
whatsapp.metaFallbackTemplates: Fallback text (used only if the approved template fails):
whatsapp.metaNotReadyTitle: Meta WhatsApp number is not ready
whatsapp.metaNotReadyHint: Ensure a WhatsApp Business number is linked in your app and status is CONNECTED in Meta dashboard.
whatsapp.tokenHint: From UltraMsg dashboard → Instance → API. Leave blank to keep the saved token.
whatsapp.templatesHint: Use placeholders like {{otp}} in double curly braces
whatsapp.metaTestHint: With Meta: sends a text message or OTP template (if configured). In dev mode add the number in Meta → WhatsApp → API Setup → test numbers. Ensure Phone Number ID is correct (not WABA ID).
whatsapp.notReadyHint: Open UltraMsg and ensure status is authenticated (connected).
whatsapp.bannedHint: Create a new UltraMsg instance with a different WhatsApp number and update Instance ID and Token here. Until then, OTP will be sent by email when available.

email.enabled: Enable outbound email from the system
email.usernameHint: Full Zoho Mail address — e.g. info@yourdomain.iq
email.appPasswordHint: From Zoho: Security → App passwords. Leave empty to keep the saved password.
email.signature: HTML signature — appended to test messages

zohoGuide.title: Zoho Mail setup for e-invoices
zohoGuide.description: To send replies and notifications you need a Zoho Mail account and an app-specific password (not your login password).
zohoGuide.step1: Create or use a mailbox on your company domain in Zoho Mail (e.g. info@iraqi-trade-center.iq).
zohoGuide.step2: At accounts.zoho.com → Security → enable 2FA if required, then create an app password for Mail/SMTP.
zohoGuide.step3: Enter the full email as username and the app password below. Default server: smtp.zoho.com port 587 (STARTTLS).
zohoGuide.step4: Save settings, then send a test message before enabling invoice email delivery.
zohoGuide.presetNote: Paid or custom domains may need smtppro.zoho.com — choose Custom SMTP to change the host.

test.title: Send test
test.description: Sends a sample HTML message using saved settings. Leave recipient empty to use the From address.

storage.providerDescription: Where new voucher files will be stored. Old files keep using their original provider.

providers.localHint: Files are written to a folder on the server itself.
providers.r2Hint: Files live in an R2 bucket — reachable from anywhere.

local.title: Local storage settings
local.description: Full server path — the user running IIS must have write permission on it.
local.rootPathHint: Example: D:/iraqitradecenter/attachments — created automatically if missing.

r2.title: Cloudflare R2 settings
r2.description: Fill in your R2 bucket details. The secret key is stored once and never displayed again.

r2.secretHintNew: Paste the secret key from your Cloudflare dashboard.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: System and account settings

about.support: For inquiries and technical support, contact your system provider. It is recommended to take regular backups of the database.

roles.title: Roles & Permissions
roles.subtitle: Create roles and assign permission sets, then attach them to users from the Users page.

form.codeLocked: System role — code cannot be changed.

roles.superAdminNote: The SuperAdmin role automatically grants all system permissions and cannot be edited here.
roles.permissionsHint: Choose the permissions granted to everyone with this role.

users.title: Users
users.deleteUserConfirm:
Delete user "{{name}}"?

The account and login name will be removed, and their email/phone entries will be freed in the contact registry for reuse.

form.usernameHint: Used on the login screen. Latin username or phone number.
form.contactsRegistryHint: Email and phone are stored in a central registry — duplicates across users and financial parties are blocked.

users.passwordGeneratedHidden: Password generated — it will not be shown on screen. Save and notify the user.
users.passwordGeneratedHint: A random password is ready — it will not be displayed here. Save and tell the user out of band.
users.avatarTooLarge: Image is too large — max 512 KB
users.mustChangeOnLogin: Require password change on first login
users.resetPasswordConfirm: Generate a new random password? The user must change it on next login.
users.passwordResetDone: New password generated — copy it and share with the user
users.tempPasswordHint: Copy it now — it won't be shown again. The user must change it on login.
users.createPasswordHint: On save, a password is generated automatically and shown in a copy dialog.

credentials.mustChangeNote: The user must change their password on first login
credentials.viewLinkHint: Share this link with the user (valid 30 minutes) — opens the copy page like the email

cashboxes.empty: No cash boxes defined. Create them from the Cash Boxes tab in Financial Management.
cashboxes.hint: The user can only use assigned cash boxes (from Financial Management). Allowed operation types per box: Receive = incoming money, Pay = outgoing money.

permissions.selectAll: Select all permissions in the system

createJournalEntry.voucherTypeLocked: Voucher type is locked from the entry source and cannot be changed
createJournalEntry.voucherTypeLockedShort: Voucher type is locked from source

transit.title: Transit Account Movements
transit.subtitle: Transit movements from account settlements — excluded from account statements

cancel.confirm: Both journal entries will be reversed and settlement {{number}} cancelled. Continue?

wallets.desc: Digital wallets for traders and companies — balance, top-up, withdraw, transfer, and statement

wallets.invalidAmount: Amount must be greater than zero

groups.title: Digital Wallets
groups.desc: Custom wallets — each wallet has a parent account and members (traders/subscribers) and can be linked to a payment provider
groups.empty: No wallets — add a new wallet
groups.defaultSet: "{{name}}" is now the default wallet — every new trader gets a membership under it
groups.structureLocked: The wallet name and grandparent account cannot be changed once it has members or accounting entries — you can only edit the funding accounts.

settings.searchAccount: Search by account code or name…
settings.groupNameHint: Name of the intermediate account holding individual wallets — e.g. the payment company name
settings.grandparentDefaultHint: Not configured — default account 2.9 will be used directly under liabilities root
settings.leafWarning: The selected account is a leaf — it will automatically be converted to a parent (group) account and will no longer accept direct journal entries after saving.

walletPosting.confirmDelete: Delete this wallet transaction? Its journal entry will be reversed and the balance restored.
walletPosting.deleted: Transaction deleted and its entry reversed
